sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76872" key="palimmetabolh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰλιμ-μεταβολή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n76872.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">repeated change</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">εἰς σώματα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.998d</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
